name: send_payment_link
description: Generate a payment link and send it to the customer via SMS. Use this for collecting a booking deposit or for customers calling to pay an outstanding balance. Always confirm the amount with the customer before calling this. Say 'I've just sent a payment link to your mobile — it'll come through in a moment.'

customer_phone.description: Customer's Australian mobile number, e.g. 0412 345 678 or +61412345678

customer_name.description: Customer's name for the payment description

amount_aud.description: Amount in Australian dollars as a number, e.g. 50 for a $50 deposit. Do not include the dollar sign.

purpose.description: Short description for the payment, e.g. 'Booking deposit', 'Outstanding balance for logbook service', 'Brake repair balance'

booking_ref.description: Booking reference number if this payment is linked to a booking, for reconciliation
